_comment: DORMANT CRON JOBS — not scheduled by Vercel. Reference only.
_why: The Vercel Hobby (free) plan allows a maximum of 2 cron jobs, each running
at most once per day. PredictSport currently runs on Hobby, so vercel.json
keeps only the single cron the app cannot function without (results/cron).
Every cron route below still exists and works as a normal API endpoint —
removing it from vercel.json only stops Vercel from triggering it on a
schedule. Until automated scheduling is restored, run these manually from
the admin tools (or by hitting the route) when needed.
TO RE-ACTIVATE: move the desired entry into the `crons` array in
vercel.json. On Hobby you may have at most 2 total and they must be daily
(no `*/5` style schedules). The two tournament crons below need a sub-daily
cadence to be useful, which requires the Vercel Pro plan.

dormant_crons._note: Daily notification digest. Manual alternative: admin trigger.
Daily cricket fixture pool seeder. Manual alternative: admin trigger.
Locks prediction windows. Needs sub-daily cadence — requires Vercel Pro. Manual alternative: admin locks windows.
Auto-finalises tournament windows. Needs sub-daily cadence — requires Vercel Pro. Manual alternative: admin finalises.
Alerts on missing results. Manual alternative: admin reviews missing results.
Hides the World Cup promo card once per year. Manual alternative: admin toggles card.
